tweets.text:
Megan Bos should have turned 38 this month. Instead, her body was found partially decomposed in a garbage can belonging to Jose Mendoza-Gonzalez, an illegal alien from Mexico. 

Mendoza-Gonzalez claims Megan had died from an overdose, and left her body in the basement for days before throwing it away in a garbage can in his yard, eventually pouring bleach on her corpse and leaving her there for nearly two months. 

Mendoza-Gonzalez was charged with abuse of a corpse, two counts of concealing the death of a person and obstructing justice. These are Class 4 felonies, but none are detainable offenses under sanctuary Governor J.B. Pritzker. Consequently, the illegal alien walked free after the conclusion of his court appearance. 

On July 19, 2025, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers in Chicago arrested him. DHS law enforcement is protecting American communities every day from another senseless tragedy like this taking place in another town, to another family. 

Victims of illegal alien crime may receive support from the Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement (VOICE) Office by contacting 1-855-488-6423.

https://t.co/ZDebERchFw

tweets.text:
Another horrific tragedy for two innocent children by the hands of a criminal illegal alien.

Kenneth Moreno Guzman, a criminal illegal alien from Mexico, forcibly broke into a back door of a family’s home on January 12, 2025, and proceeded to rape an 11-year-old girl and held her 10-year-old sister at knifepoint.

Guzman was previously arrested by local law enforcement. On March 8, 2023, Moreno Guzman was arrested by the Statesboro Georgia Sheriff's Office for driving without a license and registration.

These are the victims President Trump and Secretary Noem are fighting for and the media and sanctuary politicians ignore. We have lodged an arrest detainer to ensure ICE is notified to arrest this monster before he can prey on more innocent children.
